nasb.text: and say to them, ‘Thus says the Lord, the God of Israel, “Cursed is the man who does not heed the words of this covenant

esv.text: You shall say to them, Thus says the Lord, the God of Israel: Cursed be the man who does not hear the words of this covenant

cnv.text: 你要對他們說：‘耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：不聽從這約的話的，必受咒詛。

ccb.text: 你要告诉他们，以色列的上帝耶和华说，‘不遵守这约的人必受咒诅。
